title: FlameFrags weapon overlay
body:
Everything is fan-made.Inspired by flamefrags.Sub to my youtube channel:[Click here](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC33BRcr1V8FPIzwZkbbxvKg)
## Join my discord server
- **Why?**: Report bugs or give ideas
- Link: [Click here](https://discord.gg/qVu49UHk7)

## Contents
- the weapons are appearing everytime if you have a netherite sworde or axe
-  custom crit sweep paritcles and totem pop particles
- animated totem
- custom bow (new, only in v4.0)

## Important infos
- Under version 1.21 has no updates
- install v4.0 or later versions of the texturepack
- use [Zero Optimization modpack](https://modrinth.com/project/fVAS0VOR) for more fps and the pack takes a bit of FPS,but this modpack fixes it

## Future updates
- The axe model will look cooler
- if you rename the sword or axe it will look like the weapons(maybe)

## Other projects
- [Clownpierce always](https://modrinth.com/project/5oK9IXK3)
- [Player Head Dr0p](https://modrinth.com/project/C70OoCiI)
- [Swift Katanas(archieved)](https://modrinth.com/project/6B8d9N39)
- [Flamefrags smp overlay](https://modrinth.com/project/M7gqDcrZ)
- ![Smp overlay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e5e562fd21352edb05649f2c603ca9f25d76169.jpeg)
pls download
